articles.headline: Thomas Tuchel on entertaining England: 'People in pubs will like this'
articles.description: Thomas Tuchel wants to keep thrilling fans in pubs up and down the country after England's manager thought of the wild scenes at home while stood on the touchline.

images.name: Fans watch a screening of the FIFA World Cup match between England and Croatia  [1296x729]
images.credit: Steven Paston/PA Images via Getty Images

images.name: Where does England's performance rank against the favourites?
images.caption: Where does England's performance rank against the favourites?

articles.headline: World Cup Daily LIVE: Switzerland, Bosnia-Herzegovina continue Matchweek 2
articles.description: The second round of matches at the 2026 FIFA World Cup is underway today! Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition.

images.name: Bosnia, Dzeko [1296x729]
images.credit: Alex Livesey - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Czechia warmup 260618 [1296x729]
images.caption: Czechia warmup
images.credit: Julian Finney - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Cristiano Ronaldo #7 of Portugal reacts after failing to score in the second half  [1296x729]
images.caption: Cristiano Ronaldo #7 of Portugal reacts after failing to score in the second half
images.credit: Leslie Plaza Johnson/Icon Sportswire via Getty Images

images.name: Cristiano Ronaldo ignores media after Portugal vs. DR Congo
images.caption: Cristiano Ronaldo ignores media after Portugal vs. DR Congo

articles.headline: First week of World Cup betting brings record action at U.S. Sportsbooks
articles.description: There's been plenty of action at the books in the first week of games, from superstar goals to shocking draws.

images.name: USA [1296x729]
images.caption: After a 4-1 win over Paraguay, the U.S. is off to a hot start at the World Cup, attracting lots of handle from bettors.
images.alt: Christian Pulisic #10 and Weston McKennie #8 of the United States celebrate their side's first goal, an own goal by Damian Bobadilla #16 of Paraguay (not pictured), during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group D match between USA and Paraguay at Los Angeles Stadi
images.credit: Matt McNulty - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Cristiano Ronaldo [608x342]
images.caption: Portugal saw their World Cup odds lengthen following Wednesday's 1-1 draw with Congo DR.

images.name: Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Kylian Mbappe and France are favorites to win their third World Cup.

images.name: Spain [1296x729]
images.caption: After an exhilarating match which saw them draw with Cape Verde, Spain is now second on the odds board to win the World Cup.
images.alt: FerrÃ¡n Torres #7 of Spain dribbles during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group H match between Spain and Cape Verde on June 15th, 2026 at Atlanta Stadium in Atlanta, GA.

images.name: Felix Nmecha [576x324]
images.caption: Felix Nmecha and Germany open strong against Curacao.
images.alt: Felix Nmecha #23 of Germany celebrates his goal by pretending to take off his crown during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match.

images.name: Vinicius Jr. [1296x729]
images.caption: With a 1-1 draw, Brazil saw their odds to win the World Cup lengthen from +950 to 11-1.
images.alt: Vinicius Junior of Brazil runs with the ball during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match between Brazil and Morocco at New York New Jersey Stadium on June 13, 2026 in East Rutherford, New Jersey.
images.credit: Shaun Botterill - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Yamale for WC Odds file (260529) [1296x729]
images.caption: Spain's World Cup fortunes are tied to the health of Lamine Yamal's left leg.
images.alt: Spain's Lamine Yamal, right, scores his side third goal during the UEFA Nations League quarterfinal second leg match between the Netherlands and Spain at Mestalla stadium in Valencia, Spain, Sunday, March 23, 2025.

articles.headline: Scotland relishing underdog tag against 'real deal' Morocco - Steve Clarke

article.headline: South Africa snatch Czechia draw at World Cup after late penalty
article.description: A late penalty from Teboho Mokoena secured South Africa a 1-1 draw with the Czechia in Atalanta, which keeps alive both sides' hopes of qualification from Group A.
article.linkText: South Africa snatch Czechia draw after late penalty

article.story:
A late penalty from Teboho Mokoena secured South Africa a 1-1 draw with the Czechia in Atalanta, which keeps alive both sides' hopes of qualification from Group A.

After Patrik Schick headed an early chance wide at the far post, the Czechs -- showing five changes from the 2-1 defeat to South Korea, including West Ham midfielder Tomás Soucek dropped to the bench -- took the lead in the sixth minute.

Adam Hlozek raced on to a throw-in down the right and cut the ball back to the edge of box where Alexandr Sojka fed Michal Sadílek to clip his finish past South Africa keeper Ronwen Williams for the quickest goal of the tournament so far.

South Africa, who had Yaya Sithole and Themba Zwane sent off in their opening 2-0 loss to co-hosts Mexico at the Azteca Stadium, looked for a response as Oswin Appollis' 25-yard effort was deflected behind ahead of the first hydration break, which was met by a chorus of boos from fans at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium, where the roof was closed.

The tempo dropped heading towards half-time before Thapelo Maseko was played into the right side of the Czech penalty area, but his angled effort was cut out at the near post.

South Africa looked to freshen up their attack for the second half by sending on Orlando Pirates forward Relebohile Mofokeng. It was, though, the Czech Republic who went close to doubling their lead soon after the restart.

Vladimír Darida saw his close-range shot blocked before Lukas Cerv's speculative effort was tipped over. From the resulting corner, Bayer Leverkusen frontman Schick then headed straight at Williams

The mid-half hydration break was again greeted with jeers from the stands before South Africa were awarded a penalty with nine minutes left for handball by Czech substitute Pavel Sulc, having been struck at point-blank range from a shot by Maseko. Mokoena made no mistake from the spot, slotting the ball to the left and sending Matej Kovár the wrong way.

Neither side was able to find a late winner -- Evidence Makgopa shooting straight at Kovar after a strong turn on the edge of the box - which leaves both countries still with some hope of making the last 32.

Czechia face Mexico at the Azteca in their final group game while South Africa take on South Korea in Monterrey.

stats.name: timeStarted
stats.description: The time a match starts.

stats.name: winPct
stats.description: The percentage of matches won.

stats.name: wins
stats.description: The number of matches won.

stats.name: wonCorners
stats.description: The number of corners won.

stats.name: yellowCards
stats.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: cleanSheet
stats.description: The number of times a goalkeeper doesn't let in a goal.

stats.name: crossesCaught
stats.description: The number of crosses claimed.

stats.name: goalsConceded
stats.description: The number of goals allowed by the goalkeeper.

stats.name: partialCleenSheet
stats.description: The number of times a clean sheet is kept when playing at least a part of the game.

stats.name: penaltyKickConceded
stats.description: The number of goals allowed when the opposing team take a penalty.

stats.name: penaltyKickSavePct
stats.description: The percentage of penalty kicks a goalkeeper saves.

stats.name: penaltyKicksFaced
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks faced by a goalkeeper.

stats.name: penaltyKicksSaved
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks saved by a goalkeeper.

stats.name: punches
stats.description: The number of punches.

stats.name: saves
stats.description: The number of times a goalkeeper makes a save.

stats.name: shootOutKicksFaced
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks faced in a penalty shootout.

stats.name: shootOutKicksSaved
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks saved in a penalty shootout.

stats.name: shootOutSavePct
stats.description: The percentage of penalty kicks saved in a penalty shootout.

stats.name: shotsFaced
stats.description: The number of shots on target a goalkeeper has faced.

stats.name: smothers
stats.description: The number of smothers.

stats.name: unclaimedCrosses
stats.description: The number of crosses that were unclaimed.

stats.name: goalsPrevented
stats.description: The difference between goals on target and actual goals conceded by a goalkeeper.

stats.name: shotsOnGoalAgainst
stats.description: The number of shots on goal the opposing team has had against this team

stats.name: accurateCrosses
stats.description: The number of crosses that find their target.

stats.name: accurateLongBalls
stats.description: The number of longballs that are completed.

stats.name: accuratePasses
stats.description: The number of passes completed.

stats.name: accurateThroughBalls
stats.description: The number of through balls that find their target.

stats.name: crossPct
stats.description: The percentage of crosses that find their target.

stats.name: freeKickGoals
stats.description: The number goals scored from free kick shots.

stats.name: freeKickPct
stats.description: The percentage of free kick shots that .

stats.name: freeKickShots
stats.description: The number of free kick shots attempted.

stats.name: gameWinningAssists
stats.description: The number of game winning assists.

stats.name: gameWinningGoals
stats.description: The number of game winning goals.

stats.name: goalAssists
stats.description: The number of assists.

stats.name: headedGoals
stats.description: The number of goals scored from headers.

stats.name: inaccurateCrosses
stats.description: The number of times a cross was attempted and failed to find its target.

stats.name: inaccurateLongBalls
stats.description: The number of times a long ball was attempted and failed to be completed

stats.name: inaccuratePasses
stats.description: The number of times a pass was attempted and failed to find its target.

stats.name: inaccurateThroughBalls
stats.description: The number of times a through ball was attempted and failed to be completed.

stats.name: leftFootedShots
stats.description: The number of shots attempted with a player's left foot.

stats.name: longballPct
stats.description: The percentage of long balls attempted that find their target.

stats.name: offsides
stats.description: The number of times a player or team gets caught offside.

stats.name: penaltyKickGoals
stats.description: The number of goals scored from the penalty spot.

stats.name: penaltyKickPct
stats.description: The percentage of penalty kicks converted.

stats.name: penaltyKickShots
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks attempted.

stats.name: penaltyKicksMissed
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks missed.

stats.name: rightFootedShots
stats.description: The number of shots attempted with the right foot.

stats.name: secondAssists
stats.description: The number of assists to the player who assisted a goal.

stats.name: shootOutGoals
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks converted in penalty shootouts.

stats.name: shootOutMisses
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks missed in penalty shootouts.

stats.name: shootOutPct
stats.description: The percentage of penalty kicks in a penalty shootout that are converted.

stats.name: shotAssists
stats.description: The number of passes that directly result in a shot.

stats.name: shotPct
stats.description: The percentage of shots that are on target.

stats.name: shotsHeaded
stats.description: The number of shots attempted with the head.

stats.name: shotsOffTarget
stats.description: The number shots attempted that miss the goal.

stats.name: shotsOnPost
stats.description: The number of shots that hit the post.

stats.name: shotsOnTarget
stats.description: The number of shots that are on goal.

stats.name: throughBallPct
stats.description: The percentage of through balls played that find their target.

stats.name: totalCrosses
stats.description: The number of crosses attempted.

stats.name: totalGoals
stats.description: The number of goals scored against the opposing team.

stats.name: totalLongBalls
stats.description: The number of long balls attempted.

stats.description: The number of passes attempted.
